title: Saro´s Player Plushie Lite
description: Adds customizable player plushies to the game with easy skin downloading and detailed configuration options.
body:
![Header](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Saros_Player_Plushie/MP_SarosPlayerPlushieLite_header.webp)

> 🔔 **Looking for more features?**  
> Check out the **full version of Saro’s Player Plushie Mod** with advanced posing, item holding, and more customization options.  
> 👉 [View the Full Version](https://modrinth.com/mod/saros-player-plushie)

![Overview](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Saros_Player_Plushie/MP_SarosPlayerPlushie_description.webp)


Saro's Player Plushie Mod Lite brings fully customizable, miniature player plushies to your Minecraft world! Decorate your base with cute versions of your friends, favorite content creators, or yourself. Features a modern, easy-to-use interface for customization.


*   **Customizable Plushies** 🧸
    *   Placeable plushie blocks that can take on the appearance of any Minecraft player.
*   **Skin Fetching** 🎨
    *   Simply enter a player's name in the GUI, and the mod automatically fetches and applies their skin.
*   **Detail Control** ⚙️
    *   **Show Name Tag**: Toggle whether the player's name is displayed above the plushie.
    *   **Skin Layers**: Toggle the outer layer of the skin.

![versions](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Saros_Player_Plushie/MP_SarosPlayerPlushie_versions.webp)

### Currently Supported ✅

*   **Forge/NeoForge/Fabric 26.1**
*   **Fabric 1.21.10 and 1.21.11**
*   **Forge/NeoForge 1.21.1**
*   **Fabric 1.21.1**
*   **Forge/NeoForge 1.20.1**
*   **Fabric 1.20.1**


![join](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Saros_Player_Plushie/MP_SarosPlayerPlushie_discord.webp)

For support, feedback, or suggestions, join my [Discord](https://discord.gg/H8a8CJe) community and follow the mod’s development!


![credits](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Saros_Player_Plushie/MP_SarosPlayerPlushie_credits.webp)

*   **Tihi2k8** — Special thanks for the Plushie Model!

[![Bisect Hosting](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Saros_Player_Plushie/MP_SarosPlayerPlushieLite_promo.webp)](https://server.sarocesch.de/refersaro.php)

**Project Support & Usage**

**Hosting:** For the best performance, I recommend using BisectHosting linked in the banner.

**Modpacks:** You are free to include my work in any modpack. Please ensure proper credit is given by providing a link to this project page.
